---
title: "Getting Started with gepabds"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with gepabds}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)

library(gepabds)
library(SummarizedExperiment)
```

Introduction 

The gepabds package provides tools for analyzing gene expression data stored in SummarizedExperiment objects.

This vignette shows how to compute expression statistics for selected genes.


```{r}

#load data
data(example_se)

example_se
```

```{r}
#exploredata
# View gene names
rownames(example_se)

# View sample metadata
colData(example_se)
```

```{r}
#genesofinterest
genes_to_use <- rownames(example_se)[1:5]
genes_to_use
```


```{r}

#computeexpressionstatistics

result <- compute_expr_stats(example_se, genes = genes_to_use)

result
```
